product.name: ArGiyim Denim Kursun
product.categorySourceGroup: Cut-proof knit fabric from p-aramid. Bomb and nail proof woven fabrics from Pa6.6
product.specLine: 290 g/m², 50% HPPE 50% Polyester, Abraison Resistant, Denim Woven Fabric
descriptions: 50% HPPE (high performance polyethylene) 50% polyester denim twill fabric. The front side of the fabric is polyester which is ultra durable for sun light, the back side of the fabric is hppe which provides extra abraison resistance for motorcyclist's cloth.
ArGiyim Denim Kursun can be used on abraison resistant cloths.
290 g/m², 50% HPPE 50% Polyester, Abraison Resistant, Denim Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 2500N ; Weft > 3500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 150N ; Weft > 40N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: provides extra abraison resistance for motorcyclist's cloth
matches.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN 17092 motorcyclist norms and stated application field is 'Motorcyclist Cloth', directly confirming motorcycle apparel use.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Cut-resistant HPPE fabric with EN 388 could theoretically serve tactical wear, but no military/police/tactical use is stated.
